pages.notes: This is an index page mapping diary page numbers to places/trips. Entry 66 reads 'Vitry [en?] France' — the preposition between 'Vitry' and 'France' is partially cut off or unclear; likely 'Vitry-en-France' (a commune near Paris). Entry 62 mentions 'Bolton (Covid)' suggesting a trip during Covid restrictions, and entry 61 contains '2022' which is beyond the stated volume range of 2003-2019 — transcribed verbatim. Entry 67 'Sustons' could alternatively read 'Sustenpass' or 'Sustons' (a location near the Gotthard); 'St. Gotthard Tunnel' is clearly a Switzerland entry. Entry 70/69 reads as a combined or amended page reference. 'Foursinside Farm' may also read 'Fourhsinside Farm' or similar — transcribed as best reading. 'Middle top Top' may be 'Middleton Top'. 'Penn Onn' may be 'Penn-y-Ghent' or a Welsh place name — transcribed verbatim.
Right page is blank. A handwritten '3' appears in the top-right corner, likely an index page number. Gutter overlap shows the tail ends of left-page index entries.
